package-description: This package contains a component that collects CSV files from a time-partitioned directory and sends them as a merged email attachment.
author: Declan Ross

a009b7cd-a2bb-438d-a450-b1640b7fa5b3.name: Email Attachment from CSV (Dataflow)
a009b7cd-a2bb-438d-a450-b1640b7fa5b3.description: Walks a time-partitioned directory for CSV files, merges them into a single attachment, and emails it. Triggered by a signal on PORT1 or an optional periodic schedule.
